text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch.
And here I was thinking it was surprisingly
peaceful today. Who had to go and call me over
and ruin everything?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Nobody's here. Is there still noise in my head or
something?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The statue of the Three Goddesses is here...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
How awesome would it be if I could get some
data on them?
